sections.paragraph: (“belonging to a village,” i.q. פְּרָזִי), Perizzite, pr.n. (LXX. Φερεζαῑος); collect. Perizzites, a Canaanitish race, dwelling in the mountains of Judah, overcome by the Israelites, Jos 11:3 17:15 (their dwelling in the mountains need not set aside the etymology proposed, as their ancient abodes may have been in the plains); Gen 13:17 15:20 Exo 3:8, 17 .
